'''fashopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yogasana|yogasana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yogasana|yogasana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fashopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæshepeth|fæshepeth]] || [[word:fæshepej|fæshepej]] || [[word:fæshepesh|fæshepesh]] || [[word:fæshepe|fæshepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fashoshopoth|fashoshopoth]] || [[word:fashoshopoj|fashoshopoj]] || [[word:fashoshoposh|fashoshoposh]] || [[word:fashoshopo|fashoshopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fashopoth|fashopoth]] || [[word:fashopoj|fashopoj]] || [[word:fashoposh|fashoposh]] || [[word:fashopo|fashopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fashofpoth|fashofpoth]] || [[word:fashofpoj|fashofpoj]] || [[word:fashofposh|fashofposh]] || [[word:fashofpof|fashofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fashopotho|fashopotho]] || [[word:fashopojo|fashopojo]] || [[word:fashoposho|fashoposho]] || [[word:fashopoko|fashopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fashopoth|fashopoth]] || [[word:fashopoj|fashopoj]] || [[word:fashoposh|fashoposh]] || [[word:fashopo|fashopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fashopothol|fashopothol]] || [[word:fashopojol|fashopojol]] || [[word:fashoposhol|fashoposhol]] || [[word:fashopokol|fashopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fashopothotho|fashopothotho]] || [[word:fashopojojo|fashopojojo]] || [[word:fashoposhosho|fashoposhosho]] || [[word:fashopoko|fashopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fashopothon|fashopothon]] || [[word:fashopojon|fashopojon]] || [[word:fashoposhon|fashoposhon]] || [[word:fashopokon|fashopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fashopothoro|fashopothoro]] || [[word:fashopojoro|fashopojoro]] || [[word:fashoposhoro|fashoposhoro]] || [[word:fashopokoro|fashopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
